title: An Inquiry
content:
A Birdie cocked his little head,
        Winked his eye at me and said,
    "Say, are you a Pussy Willer,
        Or just a Kitty-Catty pillar?"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "An Inquiry"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
